## Task: Execute @6code GREEN phase for prj0000125

You are @6code. @5test RED is complete with commit `3d19b335b7` and expected failing tests. Implement GREEN tasks only:
- T-LGW2-004 (runtime fail-closed completion in gateway_core.py)
- T-LGW2-006 (deterministic event_log ordering test pattern in orchestration tests)

### Branch gate (mandatory)
Run:
- `git branch --show-current`
Expected: `prj0000125-llm-gateway-lessons-learned-fixes`
If mismatch, switch and re-check.

### Read first
1. `docs/project/prj0000125-llm-gateway-lessons-learned-fixes/llm-gateway-lessons-learned-fixes.plan.md`
2. `docs/project/prj0000125-llm-gateway-lessons-learned-fixes/llm-gateway-lessons-learned-fixes.design.md`
3. `src/core/gateway/gateway_core.py`
4. `tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py`
5. `tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core.py`

### Implement T-LGW2-004 in src/core/gateway/gateway_core.py
Required behaviors:
1. Budget denied fail-closed:
   - after reserve call, if `reservation.get("allowed", True)` is False:
     - DO NOT call provider
     - return result envelope with `status="denied"`
     - include error code `budget_denied`
2. Provider exception fail-closed:
   - wrap provider execute in try/except Exception
   - on exception:
     - invoke `budget_manager.commit_failure(...)`
     - return `status="failed"` with `budget.status="failed"`
     - do not raise exception to caller
3. Degraded telemetry guard:
   - wrap telemetry emit in try/except
   - if emit fails, still return business result
   - include `telemetry.degraded=True` in returned envelope

Preserve existing public interfaces unless absolutely required.

### Implement T-LGW2-006 in tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py
- Replace RED sentinel/non-deterministic ordering construct with deterministic shared `event_log` fixture pattern.
- Keep assertions based on chronological marker positions in shared list.
- Ensure test now validates ordering deterministically and passes.

### Validation commands (must run)
1. `& c:\Dev\PyAgent\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; pytest -q tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py`
2. `& c:\Dev\PyAgent\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; pytest -q tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core.py`
3. `& c:\Dev\PyAgent\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; pytest -q tests/core/gateway/`

Expected: all pass.

### Commit and push

- `src/core/gateway/gateway_core.py`
- `tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py`
- plus `.github/agents/data/current.6code.memory.md` and `.github/agents/data/2026-04-04.6code.log.md`

- Remove-Item Env:GH_TOKEN -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

## @6code Response Summary
- Branch gate validated on `prj0000125-llm-gateway-lessons-learned-fixes`.
- Implemented T-LGW2-004 in `src/core/gateway/gateway_core.py`:
  - Added budget-denied fail-closed check after reservation, returning `status: denied` with `budget_denied` and skipping provider execution.
  - Wrapped provider execution in try/except; on exception commits budget failure and returns non-raising `status: failed` result with `provider_exception`.
  - Added final telemetry degrade guard via `_emit_result_with_degraded_guard`; emit failures no longer break business responses and set `telemetry.degraded=True`.
- Implemented T-LGW2-006 in `tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py`:
  - Replaced cross-list ordering pattern with deterministic shared `event_log` fixture flow.
  - Added `make_gateway` fixture that wires budget/provider stubs to the shared event log.
  - Updated ordering assertions to compare marker indices in one chronological list.
- Validation commands executed:
  - `pytest -q tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py` -> `8 passed`.
  - `pytest -q tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core.py` -> `1 passed`.
  - `pytest -q tests/core/gateway/` -> `9 passed`.
  - Added module-level `validate()` to `src/core/gateway/gateway_core.py`.
  - Added compliant test file `tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core.py`.
  - Preserved orchestration behavior in `GatewayCore.handle`.
- Validation results:
  - `python -m pytest -q tests/test_core_quality.py -k "gateway_core or validate_function_exists or each_core_has_test_file"` -> `2 passed, 3 deselected`
  - `python -m pytest -q tests/core/gateway/test_gateway_core_orchestration.py` -> `4 passed`
